entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange focused on routed token swaps and liquidity services across Superchain and other supported networks.
entity.notes: HEI models DackieSwap as one entity rather than separate V2 and V3 entities. Current first-party documentation describes DackieSwap as an AI-powered decentralized exchange operating across multiple blockchains.

evidence.title: Welcome to DackieSwap
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies DackieSwap as an AI-powered decentralized exchange for trading across supported blockchains.

evidence.title: DackieSwap official trading application
evidence.notes: Official domain redirects to the live swap application and supports current active classification.

evidence.title: DackieSwap protocol discovery entries
evidence.notes: Secondary registry exposes V2/V3 rows across multiple chains; HEI consolidates them into one entity under entity-first rules.
